s: Private and open source books tracker, organizer and reading list.
d:
Openreads is the best app for keeping track of your books that is free, open source, with no ads and no tracking!

It is a reading list app that will help you organize your library with four lists provided:

  • books you finished,
  • books you are currently reading,
  • books you want to read later,
  • books you didn't finish.
You can also use custom tags and filter through them.

Openreads supports adding a book by looking it up in the Open Library database, scanning its barcode or entering the book's details manually.

You can also view some cool statistics!
